regions.rationale: AAL3 has multiple thalamic subnuclei; 'thalamus proper' could be composite. Suggest mapping to all left thalamic nuclei or use Thal_AV_L as representative.

regions.rationale: AAL3 has brainstem nuclei (VTA, SN, Red_N, LC, Raphe) but not a single 'brain stem' label. Could map to composite or leave unmapped.

regions.rationale: Caudal anterior cingulate likely corresponds to ACC_sub (subgenual) or ACC_pre. Using ACC_sub_L as best match.
